title: Create Skyblock
description: Create Skyblock is a modpack made to get the create mod with some addons together with vanilla skyblock
body:
***Create Skyblock*** is a Modpack for minecraft 1.20.1, which is mainly made for everyone who just want a new experience with the create mod. This is done by introducing the usual skyblock world to it.

The Modpack is special because it makes every resource available to automatically farm it with the create contraptions. With the create mod you can automate stuff like wheat stone diamonds and much more.
The modpack also enhances the possibilities of create by adding automatable crafting recipes for copper and netherite.

Write Me a Message on Discord if you want to leave feedback. #Lassilos
